parameters.url: ={{ 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"topicCandidate\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '\" && status==\"queued\"]|order(_updatedAt asc)[0...5]') }}

parameters.jsCode: const docs = $json.result || []; return docs.map(doc => ({ json: doc }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={"model": "{{$env.TEXT_MODEL_DRAFT || 'gpt-4.1-mini'}}", "input": [{"role":"system","content":"Return JSON brief with angle, audience, outline guidance, faq ideas, and notable entities. The brief must be informational, publication-quality, niche-aware, and aligned with the site context provided in the topic. The outline must be bespoke to the topic: do not reuse stock headings or rigid template sections, and only suggest subsections that materially improve this specific article. Prioritize the strongest angle, concrete examples, relevant entities, and structural variety over generic explainers or repetitive editorial formulas."},{"role":"user","content":"Topic: {{$json.query}} | keyword: {{$json.targetKeyword}} | existing brief context: {{ JSON.stringify($json.brief || {}) }}"}]}
